title: Payments & Wallet — ADA and Stripe class purchase flows
description: Epic E-01. All payment-related features for M4: live ADA/JPY price conversion and display with 60s refresh and 5% drift alert (F-01); ADA purchase via CIP-30 double-sign flow, pessimistic 10-block confirmation, pending state display (F-02); Stripe credit card purchase Japan-compliant with immediate access on success (F-03); parallel payment path presentation with graceful degradation when either path is unavailable (F-04); wallet connection/disconnection, unsupported wallet, wrong network handling — all supported CIP-30 wallets (F-12); admin-initiated ADA and Stripe refunds with class access revocation and reward invalidation flag (F-13); Cardano network status indicator (healthy/degraded/unreachable) (F-14); student purchase history including pending, completed, and refunded transactions (F-15).

pre_conditions: Blockfrost API key (preprod) is configured in .env
web3/config/preprod.json contains current Conway-era protocol parameters (v10.0, epoch >=275)
Stripe API keys (STRIPE_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET) are configured in .env
ADA/JPY exchange rate setting exists in the settings table (ada-to-jpy key)
Teachers have set class prices in JPY (existing platform feature)
Student enrollment and class access granting are operational (existing platform feature)
post_conditions: F-01: Class pages display JPY price and live ADA equivalent; ADA refreshes every 60s; drift >5% alerts user; rate unavailability disables ADA path gracefully leaving Stripe functional

F-02: Students complete ADA purchase via CIP-30 double-sign flow; pending state shows X/10 confirmations; class access granted after exactly 10 confirmations; duplicate and concurrent payment attempts are blocked
F-03: Students complete Stripe checkout flow; class access granted immediately on successful charge; Japan-compliant Stripe account configuration
F-04: Both payment options presented in parallel on class detail page; either path degrades independently with explanation when unavailable
F-12: CIP-30 wallet connect/disconnect handled; unsupported wallets show clear error; wrong network blocks action; pending transactions continue monitored after wallet disconnect
F-13: Admin initiates Stripe and ADA refunds; class access revoked on confirmation; rewards flagged for invalidation in course_histories; Admin and Student notified
F-14: Cardano network status (healthy / degraded / unreachable) reflected in ADA payment UI
F-15: Students view purchase history with ADA (tx hash, X/10 status) and Stripe (receipt) entries including pending and refunded states
invariants: A student must not gain class access before ADA payment reaches 10 on-chain confirmations or before Stripe charge succeeds
A student must not submit a duplicate payment for a class they already own or have a pending payment for (enforced at DB layer via unique constraint)
ADA price quote must be invalidated after the configurable window (default 5 minutes); expired quotes cannot be submitted
CIP-30 signTx(tx, partial=true) returns TransactionWitnessSet; witness merge and Blockfrost submission MUST happen server-side — never via walletAPI.submitTx
Recipient addresses (teacher commission, admin fee) use custodial HD derivation via get-custodial-address.mjs, never the student's CIP-30 spending address

acceptance: Student completes end-to-end ADA purchase: connect CIP-30 wallet -> receive ADA price quote -> sign tx -> 10-block confirmation -> class access granted
Student completes end-to-end Stripe checkout: initiate -> complete Stripe flow -> immediate class access
Both payment options visible on class detail page; disabling one leaves the other fully functional
Admin initiates Stripe refund that revokes student class access and flags rewards
Student purchase history correctly shows ADA tx hash, Stripe receipt, pending confirmations, and refunded status
All supported CIP-30 wallets function for ADA purchase flow
